top3.sql:
SELECT 
    hd_demo_sk,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN household_demographics ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
    LEFT JOIN web_sales ON cs_order_number = ws_order_number AND cs_bill_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 20...

    JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
    LEFT JOIN web_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_order_number = web_sales.ws_order_number

        AND catalog_sales.cs...

SELECT 
    hd_demo_sk,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales
FROM 
    household_demographics
    JOIN customer ON hd_demo_sk = c_current_hdemo_sk
    JOIN catalog_sales ON c_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN web_sales ON cs_order_number = ws_order_number AND cs_bill_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 2002
GROUP BY 
    hd_demo_sk
ORDER BY 
    hd_demo_sk
LIMIT 100
